beIN SPORTS 3.desc: Deportivo Alavés have won only one of their last eight LaLiga matches against Athletic Club, a 1-0 victory in their most recent league meeting in September 2025. The Vitoria side have only once managed back-to-back league wins against Athletic Club in their history, doing so between February and October 2020. Athletic Club have picked up points in each of their last three away LaLiga games against Deportivo Alavés ; they have not enjoyed a longer unbeaten run away to the Vitoria side in the competition since their first seven visits between 1931 and 2000.
